title: A Century of Battle Ends
description: On pages 1–7, a century of battle ends as mr. 3 separates Vivi from her protectors and turns Little Garden’s battlefield into a calculated execution ground.
scene: A Century of Battle Ends. Mr. 3 separates Vivi from her protectors and turns Little Garden’s battlefield into a calculated execution ground. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: This is merely the judgment of the warrior God, Elbaf...!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Is that I am not blessed by his divine protection...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Did you hear something just now?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fuhahahaha! How odd... I wonder if there's some loser crying even deep in this thick jungle?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on a century of battle ends. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
